why_included: Trial 2 high-yield candidate: large academic medical center with Weill Cornell + Texas A&M EnMed affiliations; expected to have USCE/visiting student programs accessible via web
Trial 2 no-yield candidate: small independent safety-net hospital (Mount Sinai clinical affiliate); expected absence of public USCE lanes on own site
Trial 2 ambiguous multi-campus candidate: queue domain points to SYSTEM (adventhealth.com 50+ hospitals); explicit source-scope discipline test (HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL vs INSTITUTION_SPECIFIC)
